description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: For a specific wallet, find incoming transfers of at least 1 ETH from the last 30 days, sort them by value, and add the 5 largest ones to a watchlist panel.
tasks.name: For a specific wallet, find incoming transfers of at least 1 ETH from the last 30 days, sort them by value, and add the 5 largest ones to a watchlist panel.
tasks.description: For a specific wallet, find incoming transfers of at least 1 ETH from the last 30 days, sort them by value, and add the 5 largest ones to a watchlist panel.

tasks.instruction: Using block analytics for a single day in early 2024, identify the block with the highest gas used on that day and open its details page.
tasks.name: Using block analytics for a single day in early 2024, identify the block with the highest gas used on that day and open its details page.
tasks.description: Using block analytics for a single day in early 2024, identify the block with the highest gas used on that day and open its details page.

tasks.instruction: Compare the 7-day trading volume of two ERC-20 tokens priced under $2 and add only the token with the higher 7-day volume to a token comparison widget.
tasks.name: Compare the 7-day trading volume of two ERC-20 tokens priced under $2 and add only the token with the higher 7-day volume to a token comparison widget.
tasks.description: Compare the 7-day trading volume of two ERC-20 tokens priced under $2 and add only the token with the higher 7-day volume to a token comparison widget.

tasks.instruction: Find an NFT collection with a floor price between 0.1 and 0.5 ETH and at least 10 items, then open the NFT with the lowest token ID on the first page of that collection’s items.
tasks.name: Find an NFT collection with a floor price between 0.1 and 0.5 ETH and at least 10 items, then open the NFT with the lowest token ID on the first page of that collection’s items.
tasks.description: Find an NFT collection with a floor price between 0.1 and 0.5 ETH and at least 10 items, then open the NFT with the lowest token ID on the first page of that collection’s items.

tasks.instruction: From DeFi liquidity pools, filter for pools with APY above 15% and TVL over $1,000,000, then pin the highest-APY pool from the filtered results to your dashboard.
tasks.name: From DeFi liquidity pools, filter for pools with APY above 15% and TVL over $1,000,000, then pin the highest-APY pool from the filtered results to your dashboard.
tasks.description: From DeFi liquidity pools, filter for pools with APY above 15% and TVL over $1,000,000, then pin the highest-APY pool from the filtered results to your dashboard.

tasks.instruction: Use custom analytics to build a line chart of daily token transfer transaction counts for the last 30 days and save it with the name "30d Token Transfers (Daily)".
tasks.name: Use custom analytics to build a line chart of daily token transfer transaction counts for the last 30 days and save it with the name "30d Token Transfers (Daily)".
tasks.description: Use custom analytics to build a line chart of daily token transfer transaction counts for the last 30 days and save it with the name "30d Token Transfers (Daily)".

tasks.instruction: Within gas price analytics for the last 24 hours, find the hour with the lowest average gas price, then open a transaction from that hour with a value greater than 0.03 ETH.
tasks.name: Within gas price analytics for the last 24 hours, find the hour with the lowest average gas price, then open a transaction from that hour with a value greater than 0.03 ETH.
tasks.description: Within gas price analytics for the last 24 hours, find the hour with the lowest average gas price, then open a transaction from that hour with a value greater than 0.03 ETH.

tasks.instruction: Open a decentralized exchange router contract, filter its method calls to show only "swapExactTokensForTokens" calls from the last 7 days, and save this configuration as a reusable filter named "Contract Swaps Last 7d".
tasks.name: Open a decentralized exchange router contract, filter its method calls to show only "swapExactTokensForTokens" calls from the last 7 days, and save this configuration as a reusable filter named "Contract Swaps Last 7d".
tasks.description: Open a decentralized exchange router contract, filter its method calls to show only "swapExactTokensForTokens" calls from the last 7 days, and save this configuration as a reusable filter named "Contract Swaps Last 7d".

tasks.instruction: From the addresses list, filter for addresses with at least 5 outgoing transactions in the last 24 hours, then create a new address group from the first three results named "Test Group A".
tasks.name: From the addresses list, filter for addresses with at least 5 outgoing transactions in the last 24 hours, then create a new address group from the first three results named "Test Group A".
